mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HOMPI_ALBUM_COMMENT( HOMPI_ID, ALBUM_ID, ALBUM_COMMENT_CONTENT, INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES( #{hompiId}, #{albumId}, #{commentContent}, #{insertUserId} )
mapper.select: SELECT A.ALBUM_COMMENT_ID AS commentId, A.HOMPI_ID AS hompiId, A.ALBUM_ID AS albumId, A.INSERT_USER_ID AS userId, A.ALBUM_COMMENT_CONTENT AS commentContent, A.FIXED_YN AS fixedYN, B.NAME AS userName, DATE_FORMAT(A.INSERT_DT, '%Y.%m.%d %H.%i') AS insertDt FROM HOMPI_ALBUM_COMMENT A JOIN USER_BASIC B ON A.INSERT_USER_ID = B.USER_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.ALBUM_ID = #{albumId} AND A.HOMPI_ID = #{hompiId} ORDER BY A.INSERT_DT;
